title: Nine-Expression Portrait Grid
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for 9:16 portrait sheets where one subject remains identity-consistent across a precise 3 by 3 grid of expressions, poses, and styling changes.

en.title: Nine-Expression Portrait Grid
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for 9:16 portrait sheets where one subject remains identity-consistent across a precise 3 by 3 grid of expressions, poses, and styling changes.

zh-CN.title: 3x3 九宫格多表情写真
zh-CN.description: 测试 9:16 竖幅 3x3 九宫格中同一人物的脸部一致性、表情差异、姿态变化和版式清晰度。
